data.title: MCA Operational Performance Director
data.raw_snippet:
Minimum Required Qualifications

  

Education:


Bachelor’s degree in engineering or a related technical discipline (Master’s preferred).

  

Technical knowledge:

* Experience in testing, inspection, certification activities is a plus
* Practical experience of lean methods, 5S, standardized work, problem solving, VSM, Kaizen, Hoshin Kanri with evidence of real sustainable financial and behavioral results
* Project management certificate or experience
* Advanced Office 365 skills

data.title: PMO - Project Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary**


The Project Director will lead large‑scale data center development programs, overseeing EPC/EPCM delivery, PMO governance, and multi‑vendor execution across complex, mission‑critical environments. This role requires deep technical expertise in MEP and data center infrastructure, strong command of regulatory frameworks in KSA, and proven leadership in managing global contractors, OEMs, and stakeholders.
